title: Bolyra Conformance Test Vector Schema
description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for Bolyra conformance test vectors. Validates the common structure of all vector types without per-type sub-schemas.

version.description: Semantic version of the test vector suite (e.g., '0.4.0')

failureClass.description: A host fail-closed classification (External Verifier Contract v1 §16.3): the specific reason a conforming host denied when the spawned verifier misbehaved.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this vector

description.description: Human-readable description of what this vector tests

type.description: The category of conformance behavior being tested. 'external_verifier' is an IO-contract class: the runner spawns the built 'bolyra verify' CLI and diffs the stdout verdict, OR — when inputs.static_verdict is present — validates a literal verdict object against the §3.4 verdict schema without spawning (used to exercise the proof-system `kind` self-description across classes). 'host_behavior' is a HOST-conformance class: the runner spawns a misbehaving-verifier fixture (spec/fixtures/host-conformance/) via the host-under-test (default spec/reference-host.js, overridable with the HOST_CMD env) and asserts the host fails closed per §7.2/§7.3. See spec/external-verifier-contract-v1.md §16.

status.description: Stability level of this vector; experimental vectors may change without notice

inputs.description: Arbitrary key/value inputs supplied to the construct under test

result.description: Whether this input combination should pass or fail conformance

verdict.description: For 'external_verifier' vectors: the expected wire verdict on the CLI's stdout

code.description: For 'external_verifier' deny vectors: the expected denial code from the External Verifier Contract v1 registry

kind.description: For 'external_verifier' static-verdict vectors: the expected verifier proof-system self-description (External Verifier Contract v1 §3.5). An absent verdict `kind` defaults to 'zk'.

host_decision.description: For 'host_behavior' vectors: the REQUIRED decision the host-under-test must emit when the fixture verifier misbehaves (External Verifier Contract v1 §16).

failure_class.description: For 'host_behavior' fail-closed vectors: the required host failure class (or an array of acceptable classes for genuinely ambiguous framing violations). See §16.3.

verifier_code.description: For 'host_behavior' relayed-deny vectors: the §9 denial code the host must relay unchanged, with NO host failure_class attached (§16.3).

nonce_reserved.description: For 'host_behavior' host-nonce vectors: nonce values that MUST be durably reserved in the host store after an allow (reserve-before-act, §7.3/§16.5).

action_taken.description: For 'host_behavior' host-nonce vectors: whether the host must have authorized the action (written the §16.5 action-log marker). true after a novel allow; false on a replay deny — proving reservations gate the action.

expected.description: Expected outcome, including result and any additional behavioral checks
